series_metadata.series_description: Recording of inquiries to agency administration from the general public or government agencies. Records may include: Correspondence, responsive records and any additional record relevant to provide proper customer service to constituents.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Maintain three (3) state fiscal years following date of receipt of inquiry. when no longer of administrative value. An RC-3 is required when destroying these records. ; Electronic: Maintain three (3) state fiscal years following date of receipt of inquiry. when no longer of administrative value. An RC-3 is required when destroying these records
